audit_name: AI_OS Stage 47-50 Documentation Index Audit Decision Matrix Draft

entries.industry_alignment: Partial alignment with staged governance and clear folders; needs continued index validation.
entries.recommended_action: Use documentation and ownership indexes to reduce navigation and ownership ambiguity.
entries.notes: No folder moves, deletes, or renames are approved.

entries.industry_alignment: Strong alignment with protected governance authority and human approval rules.
entries.recommended_action: Keep protected root files authoritative until explicit promotion or edit approval.
entries.notes: Protected root files must not be edited without explicit approval.

entries.industry_alignment: Draft index improves discoverability but is not yet authoritative.
entries.recommended_action: Validate category coverage and add source-of-truth mapping before promotion.
entries.notes: Index draft does not override protected files.

entries.industry_alignment: Ownership categories are defined but need validation against actual repo paths.
entries.recommended_action: Create DRY_RUN validation for ownership path patterns before APPLY usage.
entries.notes: Ownership draft does not approve protected-file edits.

entries.industry_alignment: DRY_RUN-only validation aligns with controlled change management.
entries.recommended_action: Maintain exit-code discipline and PASS/FAIL summaries.
entries.notes: Validators must not write files unless separately approved for APPLY behavior.

entries.industry_alignment: Preview planning is acceptable; persistence is not yet approved.
entries.recommended_action: Define telemetry schemas and privacy boundaries before any writer activation.

entries.industry_alignment: Static-to-preview planning is acceptable before production UI.
entries.recommended_action: Require static preview approval before dashboard output generation.

entries.industry_alignment: Strong boundary because writer activation remains approval-gated.
entries.recommended_action: Keep report, telemetry, and dashboard writers blocked until explicit APPLY approval.
entries.notes: This checkpoint creates planning files only.

entries.industry_alignment: Human approval gates align with controlled automation standards.
entries.recommended_action: Require explicit approval before APPLY stages, protected edits, commits, pushes, and production automation.
entries.notes: Commit and push remain protected actions.

entries.industry_alignment: Strong separation from broker execution and live trading.
entries.recommended_action: Keep LLMs out of the live order path and keep trading automation blocked.
entries.notes: AI_OS is infrastructure, not the live trading bot.

entries.industry_alignment: Production readiness cannot be claimed before final approval gates.
entries.recommended_action: Complete documentation, validator, writer, dashboard, telemetry, security, and approval reviews before production claims.

entries.industry_alignment: Stage planning supports controlled maturity but requires checkpoint validation.
entries.recommended_action: Use Stage 51-100 blocks as planning checkpoints, not automation approval.
entries.notes: Future APPLY stages require human approval.
